attraction_name: Site of the Sino-American Cooperative Organization Concentration Camp - Zhazidong Prison
description: A prison where the Kuomintang detained Communist Party members and progressive individuals, an important site for red revolutionary education.
Riverside Avenue on the southern bank of the Yangtze River, the best location to enjoy the night view of Yuzhong Peninsula.
A treasure trove of Chongqing's history and culture, showcasing exquisite Three Gorges relics and offering insights into Chongqing's profound history.
At the confluence of two rivers, a historic port of Chongqing where visitors can take a Two Rivers cruise to enjoy the night scenery.
A landmark building in Chongqing, designed in the style of an ancient palace, a classic example of modern Chinese architectural art.
A museum of China's revolutionary history, showcasing the Hongyan Spirit during the Anti-Japanese War and the War of Liberation in Chongqing.
The largest zoo in Southwest China, a giant panda breeding base, ideal for family-friendly visits.
A group of ancient Qing Dynasty buildings, showcasing immigrant culture and providing insights into the historical and cultural roots of Chongqing.
The largest outdoor graffiti art street in Chongqing, featuring vibrant wall art, a must-visit spot for artistic youth.
A landmark bridge spanning the Jialing River, the best vantage point to view the full scenery of Hongya Cave and the river landscape.
